activate-root-paths: Activate root paths to connect source to target ({{active}}/{{max}} edges)
click-tiles-instruction-v2: Click tiles to rotate through pipe shapes and route the wind from S to T
completion-body: As the first rays of dawn pierce through the canopy, the forest breathes again. Every stone, every root, every whisper of wind carries the memories you helped restore. The Heartwood pulses with renewed life, its light spreading through the root network to every corner of these ancient woods.
controls-hint: WASD · SHIFT run · SPACE jump · F flashlight · E interact · TAB journal · ESC pause
drag-totems-instruction-v2: Drag the totems to match the shadow silhouettes ({{aligned}}/{{total}})
garden-status_one: 🌼 Your garden: {{count}} plants, {{blooms}} blooming — they grow even while you're away
garden-status_other: 🌼 Your garden: {{count}} plants, {{blooms}} blooming — they grow even while you're away
glyph-instructions-v2: Drag fragments onto the faint glyph and right-click to rotate until the engraved ring joins ({{placed}}/{{total}})
intro-hint: Look for the glowing notebook nearby to begin.
intro-tagline: The forest remembers. Use your flashlight to reveal its secrets.
journal-close-hint: Press TAB or ESC to close
journal-no-entries-category: No entries in this category yet.
journal-no-entries-yet: No entries discovered yet. Explore the forest to find inscriptions and notes.
locked-hint-day-v2: WASD · SHIFT run · SPACE jump · G plant · E water · ESC pause
locked-hint-night-v2: WASD · SHIFT run · SPACE jump · F flashlight · G plant · E water · ESC pause
objective-enter-portal-arch: Enter the portal at the Gateway Arch
objective-enter-portal-grove: Enter the portal to the Tranquil Grove
objective-explore-flashlight: Explore — your flashlight reveals hidden puzzle stones
objective-heartwood: Break the last seal at the Heartwood
objective-root-gate: Awaken the Root Nexus at the far gate
objective-solve-gateway: Solve puzzles to unlock the gateway ({{solvedCount}}/{{totalPuzzles}})
objective-ward-seal: Find and solve the ward seal at the Gateway Arch
press-play-prompt: Press play to hear the forest's memory
reflection-instructions: Click to place/rotate mirrors and guide the light beam to the target
reflection-instructions-prisms: Guide the beam through every prism ◆ to the target
ward-seal-instruction-v2: Rotate each ring until its glowing ward glyph rests beneath the marker
